mechanism_narrative: Declining federal funds rates reduce corporate borrowing costs and compress equity discount rates, directly increasing present value of future cash flows and generating positive S&P 500 forward returns.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline.

mechanism_narrative: A rapid rise in the unemployment rate signals deteriorating labor market conditions and impending recession, triggering risk-off sentiment and negative S&P 500 forward returns over a quarter.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in > 60% of triggered instances despite negative signal, or t-stat for return difference is insignificant.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous declines in retail sales and housing starts indicate a broad consumer demand contraction, reducing corporate revenue expectations and driving negative equity returns.
failure_condition: Joint decline yields positive forward returns >55% of the time, or interaction term coefficient is statistically insignificant in multivariate regression.

mechanism_narrative: Rising industrial production reflects strong manufacturing output and capacity utilization, supporting corporate profit margins and generating positive short-term equity returns.
failure_condition: Signal direction flips to negative in late-cycle regime, or 5-day forward returns show no significant positive correlation with production growth.

mechanism_narrative: Consumer price index values exceeding 258.0 indicate accelerating inflation that forces central banks to halt easing, raising discount rates and producing negative equity returns.
failure_condition: High inflation coincides with positive forward returns >65% of the time, or threshold effect vanishes in out-of-sample testing.

mechanism_narrative: Concurrent payroll growth and falling unemployment confirm robust labor market expansion, boosting consumer spending confidence and driving positive equity returns over a quarter.
failure_condition: Rank IC falls below 0.02 over any 3-year rolling window, or joint signal predicts negative returns >50% of the time.

mechanism_narrative: Positive quarterly GDP growth confirms macroeconomic expansion, directly increasing corporate earnings forecasts and generating positive forward equity returns over a quarter.
failure_condition: Forward returns are negative in >50% of positive GDP growth quarters, or correlation coefficient is below 0.10 in walk-forward analysis.

mechanism_narrative: A monthly industrial production decline exceeding 1.0% combined with falling retail sales signals a synchronized supply-demand contraction, triggering recession fears and negative returns.
failure_condition: Signal predicts positive returns >60% of triggered instances, or interaction effect is statistically indistinguishable from zero.
